title: EEG Emotion Decoder & Neural Environment
description: Cross-subject EEG emotion classifier using EEGNet on the GAMEEMO dataset. Achieved 54.6% accuracy on LOSO cross-validation vs. 25% chance baseline.

title: E4E Geospatial Segmentation Pipeline
description: Scaled geospatial segmentation pipelines to multi-TB Sentinel/UAV imagery, cutting preprocessing time by 60% via parallelized NDVI/NDWI feature extraction.

title: E-Commerce Integration
description: Built brand identity and Shopify integration for premium shapewear utilizing strictly nylon and spandex with 3-level adjustable straps.

title: LLNL ECG Arrhythmia Classifiers
description: Trained binary and 5-class arrhythmia classifiers on 14,000+ ECG samples using XGBoost.

title: KAST.gg Retention SQL Analysis
description: Surfaced retention drivers from SQL analysis of 10,000+ user engagement lifecycles.
